description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional lounge with a clean, minimalist design, upholstered in a light-colored fabric. The lounge features three main seat sections and a chaise extension, providing ample seating space for multiple people. The backrest is segmented into three distinct cushions, each with subtle horizontal stitching, and the seat cushions are thick and plush for comfort. The armrests are asymmetrical, with one end featuring a low, angled armrest and the other end open for easy access. The lounge is supported by slim, black metal legs that are slightly angled outward, giving it a contemporary and airy appearance. The overall look is sleek and inviting, suitable for urban parks, public plazas, or modern outdoor communal spaces.
description: A modern L-shaped sectional lounge with light upholstery, segmented back cushions, and slim black metal legs. Features a chaise extension and asymmetrical armrests for a contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three seat sections, segmented back cushions, and the left-side armrest.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise extension and the thickness of the seat cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the lounge, the segmented backrest, and the open right end.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the right end without an armrest and the angled black legs.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large seat cushions and three segmented backrest cushions, all attached; one chaise section extends to the right.
attribute_backrest_design: Straight, medium-height backrest with three segmented cushions and subtle horizontal stitching.
attribute_armrest_presence: One low, angled armrest on the left; right end is open with no armrest.
attribute_leg_style: Slim, black metal legs, slightly angled outward, medium height, minimalist design.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light fabric with subtle horizontal stitching on the backrest cushions; no visible tufting or decorative patterns.
